name: coderail
description: North-Star, Coordinate Contract Draft, Done Gate, Inspect, and traceable governance for AI coding agents.

interface.shortDescription: Draft before coding. Verify before done. Inspect before handoff.
interface.longDescription: CodeRail is a repo-local governance rail for AI coding agents. It adds a North-Star Kernel, Coordinate Contract Draft, CodeRail Coordinate (Goal/Task/Scope/Verify/Stop/Persist), task contracts, execution batches, verification-before-complete, runtime state inspect, handoff discipline, asset boundaries, and a lightweight trace graph without turning your repo into a workflow engine.
defaultPrompt: Use CodeRail to draft a coordinate contract before coding.
Use CodeRail to inspect state and run the done gate before handoff.
